titleStmt.title: SII 31.121: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 121. (A.R. No. B 270 of 1936.) INJĒḌU, SIRUVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up against the prākāra wall (inside), to the proper right of the main entrance into the temple of Veṅkaṭēśvara.
It is dated Śaka 1480, Kāḷayukti, Chaitra ba. 6, corresponding to April 9, Saturday, 1558 A.D. f.d.t. °06.

Slightly damaged. Records the remission of taxes like pannu, Kānika, mangali pannu (taxes on barbers), Dommari-pannu, Veṭivēmulu etc., collected from the villagers of Gomdalūru sīma by Konḍrājayyadēva mahārājulu, son of the mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja Veṅkatēśa. The Gomdalūrisīma is said to have been given as nāyaṁkara by the king to Rāmarāju Veṅkaṭēśa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: A crescent, the Vaishna cast mark and the Sun are carved at the begining
div.p:
Avimnamastu . svasti . śrī jayādbhu(bhyu)da
(ṁ)ya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1480 Agunēṭi kāḷayukti saṁvatsara
ṁcaitra ba 6 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāsi(śi)vadēvama
hārāyalugāru vijayā(ya)nagaramaṁdu vajra
siṁhvāsanārūḍhulai kūcuṁḍi pṛidhivi sāmrā
jyaṁsēyucuṁḍagānu śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁ
ḍalēśvara rāmarājuveṁkaṭēśuni komāḷlu koṁ
ḍrājayyadēva mahārājulugāru yicinadha
rmmaśāsanaṁ śrīsadāśivadēva mahārāyalugā
ru māku nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcci goṁ
dalūri sīmaku cellēgrāmāla maṁgaḷla I
cina dharmaśāsanaṁ kramameṭlanina śrīsadāsi(śi)va
dēvamahārāyalu ssi(si)ṁhvāsanānku cellē ne
maṁgaḷa Ōjarikāllu peṭīna pannu kānika
yi maṁnniṁcci sarvvamānyaṁgānu peṭṭari
rāna nēmunnu mānāyaṁkarānku cellē
grāmālu maṁgaḷōjulu pe
kānika kaṭṇālu doṁmmari paṁnnu veṭivēmulu sa
hagānu sarvvamānyaṁgānu maṁnistiṁmi
ṁpautrapāraṁparryaṁgānu Ācaṁdrākkasdhāyi
gānu sukhāna bradikēdi Idarma
yavvaru tappinānu tamatallitaṁḍṛulanu
lōnu vadhiṁccina pāpānaṁbōvāru
cina dharmmaśāsanaṁ . svadattā paradattaṁ vāyō
suṁdhara ṣṭhirvva ruṣa sahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 31.121 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
